title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. atrogilosum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. atrogilosum is a lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as Hawkweed, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. atrogilosum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion and reduce symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to act as an anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. atrogilosum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
